analysis.test: L. 113-1 CPI : présomption de titularité au profit de celui sous le nom duquel l'œuvre est divulguée ; L. 113-5 CPI : titularité de l'œuvre collective au profit de la personne morale sous le nom de laquelle elle est divulguée. La présomption suppose des actes d'exploitation publics, paisibles et non équivoques. Pour renverser la présomption, Cassiopée/Julien Mercier doit prouver soit l'absence d'originalité de Bastille, soit que la titularité appartient à un tiers non cédant ou à […] Méridian Studios n'a qu'à établir ses actes d'exploitation paisibles et non équivoques sous son nom.
faits: Méridian Studios has exploited and disclosed Bastille under its trade name since at least October 2, 2019 (bailiff's reports [constats d'huissier], Exhibits 5, 6, 8, 8 bis).
The trademark Bastille was filed by Méridian Studios (graph: 'Bastille —filed by→ Méridian Studios').
The graph references a 'fact: […] of the prototype and design for Bastille' attributed to Méridian Studios.
A transfer e-mail […] → Méridian Studios dated 01/09/2019 appears in the file and may evidence a chain of title.
Bastille is sold on Amazon (bailiff's report [constat d'huissier] of October 2, 2019, Exhibit 6) under the name Méridian Studios, in a peaceful and unequivocal manner.

The TJ Paris (Exhibit 12, 18 December 2020, Cassiopée v. Méridian Studios) noted that Cassiopée failed to establish that it held the rights it asserted in Carto Royale 4 — this precedent undermines Cassiopée's credibility in claiming rights in Bastille without formal proof.
No claim by an identified natural-person author has been submitted to the file at this stage by Cassiopée or Julien Mercier with respect to Bastille.
analysis.faille: The assignment instrument […] → Méridian Studios is evidenced only by an e-mail; it has not been established that this e-mail satisfies the formal requirements of art. L. 131-3 (express mention of each right assigned, scope, intended use, duration, territory). Furthermore, the identity and precise status of […] (original author? employee? co-author?) are not documented in the file.
analysis.riposte: On the one hand, the presumption under Art. L. 113-1 does not require production of an assignment instrument: it arises solely from acts of public, peaceful, and unequivocal exploitation carried out under the name Méridian Studios (Amazon sales since 2019, trademark filing, bailiff's reports [constats d'huissier]). It is for Cassiopée/Julien Mercier to rebut this presumption by affirmative contrary evidence, not for Méridian Studios to justify a chain of assignment. On the other hand, the e-mail of 09/01/2019 constitutes at minimum a written commencement of proof [commencement de preuve écrite] of the chain of rights, corroborated by subsequent acts of exploitation. Finally, the Paris Tribunal judiciaire 2020 precedent (Exhibit 12) demonstrates that Cassiopée itself failed to establish its own ownership over a comparable game.
analysis.pourquoi: The presumption under Article L. 113-1 operates in favor of Méridian Studios, but the chain of title ([…] → Méridian Studios) rests on a single email that has not been formalized as an assignment instrument compliant with Article L. 131-3 (written assignment, […] specifying scope, purpose, duration, and territory). Should Julien Mercier or Cassiopée produce a prior contract or affidavit establishing that […] or a third party assigned the rights to them, or that […] was himself an employee author/work-for-hire author of another entity, the presumption may be rebutted.

autorites.title: L113-1 — Code de la propriété intellectuelle
Cass. civ. 1, no. 11-10.132, March 22, 2012
themes: personne physique ou morale à l'initiative de l'oeuvre collective
autorites.summary: C'est sans inverser la charge de la preuve qu'une cour d'appel, ayant constaté que les […] revendiquées par la société agissant en contrefaçon de droits d'auteur avaient fait l'objet de contrats de cession de droits au profit de tiers, en a déduit que, faute pour la société de fournir un quelconque élément propre à établir l'existence de droits patrimoniaux résiduels dont elle serait restée investie, celle-ci était irrecevable à agir du chef de la protection de ces droits

analysis.acte_referme: A copyright assignment deed in […] proper form signed by […] in favor of Méridian Studios, expressly identifying the rights assigned in Bastille (reproduction, public performance, adaptation), the scope, duration, and territory, in accordance with art. L. 131-3 CPI; failing that, a notarized affidavit or judicial admission by […] acknowledging Méridian Studios as the sole rights holder.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier contend that the presumption under L. 113-1 has been rebutted: the e-mail […] → Méridian Studios does not constitute a valid assignment for failure to comply with L. 131-3 (absence of identification of the rights assigned, duration, and territory), so that Méridian Studios holds no enforceable economic rights and lacks standing to bring a copyright infringement action.
analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée and Julien Mercier argue, relying on Exhibit 28 (Cass. Ch. Mixte, 6 septembre 2002 — principle that no party may create evidence in its own favor, applicable to admissibility and standing) and on Exhibit 31 (Cass. com., 12 juin 2012, n°10-20.540 — on the conditions for establishing a right and abuse of process), that the presumption under art. L. 113-1 cannot substitute for the absence of a documented chain of title: the e-mail […] → Méridian Studios, not bearing a certified date and not compliant with art. L. 131-3, cannot constitute an assignment enforceable against third parties. They conclude therefrom that Méridian Studios, lacking a valid title, has no standing to bring a copyright infringement action against Julien Mercier's exploitation of Bastille through Tohu-Bohu, and that the action is inadmissible or without merit.

pieces_adverses.piece: Contract or correspondence […] […] between Cassiopée/Julien Mercier, predating 09/01/2019, relating to Bastille.
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the certified date (absence of registration, postmark, or notarial act) and the scope of the rights allegedly assigned; argue that this document was not produced in a timely manner

pieces_adverses.piece: Affidavit of […] asserting that he/she never validly assigned his/her rights to Méridian Studios.
pieces_adverses.contre: Counter with the e-mail of 09/01/2019 as a contrary extrajudicial admission; raise the personal interest of […] and the lack of probative value of a unilateral affidavit executed after the commencement of the dispute.

pieces_adverses.piece: Screenshot or archive demonstrating that Bastille was exploited under a different name or by a different entity prior to 2019
pieces_adverses.contre: Challenge the authenticity and chain of custody of the screenshot (absence of bailiff's report, uncertified date); establish by Méridian Studios's bailiff's reports that exploitation under its name is prior and continuous

pieces_attendues: Copyright assignment deed […] → Méridian Studios compliant with art. L. 131-3 (signed, dated, rights listed, duration, territory)
Witness statement or declaration by Raphaël Dumas acknowledging Méridian Studios as the sole rights holder in Bastille
Additional bailiff's reports [constats d'huissier] evidencing exclusive exploitation under the name Méridian Studios (Amazon, distributors, trade shows)
Kbis extract or business commencement document reflecting the trade name Bastille as registered to Méridian Studios

autorites_adverses.title: Cass. civ. 1, no. 06-13.342, April 3, 2007
themes: auteur ayant cédé ses droits patrimoniaux
garantie due à l'éditeur de l'exercice paisible et exclusif du droit cédé
droit au respect du nom de l'auteur
reproduction totale ou partielle de l'oeuvre d'autrui en s'en appropriant la paternité
autorites_adverses.summary: Ayant constaté qu'un auteur avait cédé à un éditeur la totalité de ses droits patrimoniaux, sans se réserver la possibilité de poursuivre les tiers contrefacteurs en raison des atteintes […] y seraient éventuellement portées, une cour d'appel le déclare à bon droit irrecevable à agir en contrefaçon sur le fondement de ces droits, peu important que ceux-ci aient été cédés en contrepartie d'une rémunération proportionnelle
